return(function(k,o,P,q,D,e,T,y,u,M,r,R,Y,A,L,t,i,Z,Q,O,F,j,v)Q,L,A,r,v,t,y,Z,u,R,j,i,O,M,Y,F=function(k,S)local o=L(S)local P=function(P,q,D,e)return Y(k,{P;q,D;e},S,o)end return P end,function(k)for Y=#D return o(T)end,function(k,S)local o=L(S)local P=function(P)return Y(k,{P},S,o)end return P end return(y(267620+13084783,{}))(o(T))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
